div.p: This case-sensitive code system http://hl7.org/fhir/us/codex-mopa/CodeSystem/treatment-line-cs defines the following codes:

tr.td: The first line of systemic anti-cancer therapy for this indication.
The second line of systemic anti-cancer therapy; administered after first-line therapy failure, progression, or intolerance.
The third or any subsequent line of systemic anti-cancer therapy.
Maintenance therapy administered to prolong response after induction or consolidation treatment.

description.value:
Ordinal codes representing the line of systemic anti-cancer therapy. These codes are used in the TreatmentLineVS value set and on the LineOfTherapyObservation and regimen profiles.
**mCODE Migration Candidate** — These codes are proposed for adoption in mCODE STU5 or as a SNOMED CT extension request. Once standard codes are available, this code system should be deprecated.

purpose.value: mCODE Migration Candidate — proposed for adoption in mCODE STU5 or as a SNOMED CT extension request. Once standard codes are available this code system will be deprecated. It is NOT intended to be a permanent artifact of this IG. See the mCODE Gap Proposals page for the migration plan.

definition.value: The first line of systemic anti-cancer therapy for this indication.
The second line of systemic anti-cancer therapy; administered after first-line therapy failure, progression, or intolerance.
The third or any subsequent line of systemic anti-cancer therapy.
Maintenance therapy administered to prolong response after induction or consolidation treatment.
